description: Interview with Luca Netz, creator of Pudgy Penguins, discussing the success of a recent tweet and the evolution of their video content. The conversation touches on the history of Pudgy Penguins and personal anecdotes.
topic_summary: Luca Netz shares insights on the growth of Pudgy Penguins and his journey in the NFT space, including the impact of social media and community engagement [t=0:08].
